meaning: adj.硬的,僵直的,拘谨的,呆板的,艰难的,费劲的,僵硬的
examples: He rubbed his arms and stiff legs.
She greeted him with stiff formality.
Linseed oil will soften stiff leather.
The chemical giant wanted a polypropylene versatile enough to go from stiff to soft.
They next face a stiff test against France away in Paris on Friday, 27 February.
